nodes.label: CLI Entrypoint
nodes.responsibility: Parse command-line arguments, build engine config from CLI flags, dispatch to pipeline, format and emit JSON output. Provides the hmm-regime console script entry point.

nodes.label: Regime Pipeline & Orchestration
nodes.responsibility: Central orchestration: engine resolution via registry, regime classification, Markov chain statistics (transition matrix, stationary distribution, persistence, signal), regime transitions extraction, walk-forward backtest, duration forecasting, and output assembly into PipelineResult. Owns pipeline.py, engine_protocol.py, walk_forward.py, markov_chain.py, regime_transitions.py, duration_forecast.py, engine_configs.py.

nodes.label: Engine Implementations
nodes.responsibility: Five independent regime classification engines, all implementing the RegimeEngine protocol: threshold (close-only vectorized), hmm_generic (HMM + ~50 SMA features), hmm_messina (HMM + 19 Wilder's features), robust_hmm (HMM + Huber/MCD outlier resistance), fshmm (HMM + feature saliency learning). Shared base class HMMEngineBase in _hmm_engine.py plus pipeline helpers in _hmm_pipeline.py.

nodes.label: Data Processing & Feature Engineering
nodes.responsibility: CSV loading with column auto-detection, two feature engineering pipelines (generic ~50 SMA-based indicators, messina 19 Wilder's-smoothed indicators), low-level technical indicator computation (ATR, RSI, MACD, Bollinger, VSTOP, ADX/DI, KDJ, etc.).

nodes.label: Backtesting & Evaluation
nodes.responsibility: Multi-ticker evaluation harness that runs all engines against CSVs or tickers with comparison table output. Performance metrics (Sharpe, drawdown) used by walk-forward backtest. Hyperparameter sweep scripts at repo root and scripts/ directory.
nodes.evidence_gap: eval.py is separate from backtesting/ directory but both are related to evaluation

nodes.label: Utilities
nodes.responsibility: Shared data type definitions and logging configuration. Small utility layer consumed by pipeline and engines.

nodes.label: Evaluation Harness
nodes.responsibility: Multi-ticker evaluation CLI mode that runs one or more engines against multiple CSV files or yfinance tickers, producing comparison tables and JSON evaluation results.

nodes.label: Hyperparameter Sweep Scripts
nodes.responsibility: Standalone scripts for hyperparameter optimization sweeps across engines (messina_sweep, fshmm_sweep, robust_hmm_sweep, hmm_sweep) and analysis/messina_analysis scripts. Not part of the importable package.

nodes.label: Test Suite
nodes.responsibility: 52 test modules (38 unit, 14 integration) covering pipeline, engines, data processing, walk-forward, degenerate fits, feature engineering, CLI, and contracts. No test runner config violations; slow integration tests gated behind --runslow marker.

edges.description: CLI imports pipeline.run() and engine_protocol classes
Pipeline resolves engines via ENGINE_REGISTRY (lazy import)
Pipeline uses load_prices for price validation
Sweep scripts import pipeline.run() for evaluation
Tests import engine classes and _hmm_engine base
CLI integration tests call hmm-regime script
